case_title: DEAN JACOB SAMPSON VS. BENJAMIN PINA-VERTIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,422.00 FILED BY SAMPSON, DEAN JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT PINA-VERTIN, BENJAMIN DILGER, LIBERTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, DEAN JACOB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINA-VERTIN, BENJAMIN DILGER, LIBERTY $2,922.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,022.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500 ARE AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY-CIVIL (WITHOUT COURT ORDER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, DEAN JACOB
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, DEAN JACOB AS TO DEFENDANT PINA-VERTIN, BENJAMIN DILGER, LIBERTY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $35.00 SERVED DEC-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINA-VERTIN, BENJAMIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $35.00 SERVED DEC-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DILGER, LIBERTY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,717.16 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PINA-VERTIN, BENJAMIN DILGER, LIBERTY
